targets.rawSql:
select 
 TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', i.due_date), 'MM/YY') AS "Mês",
 COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) as "Faturas"  
 from invoices i
 where i.company_id = '$company_id'
 AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
 AND i.status <> 5
 AND i.due_date::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
 AND i.due_date::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
 group BY date_trunc('month', i.due_date)
 ORDER BY date_trunc('month', i.due_date);

SELECT
    ct.name AS "Tipo de Recebimento",
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) * 100.0) / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) OVER (), 2) AS "(%)"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id 
    AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id 
    AND c.company_id = i.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id 
    AND ca.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_types ct ON ca.collection_type_id = ct.id
WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
    AND NOT p.deleted
    AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
    AND p.paid_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
    AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY ct.name
ORDER BY "(%)" DESC;

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', p.paid_at) AS "time",
    ct.name AS "Tipo de Recebimento",
    --COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS "Qt.",
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) * 100.0) / 
        SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('month', p.paid_at)), 
        2
    ) AS "(%)"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id AND c.company_id = i.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id AND ca.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_types ct ON ca.collection_type_id = ct.id
WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
  AND NOT p.deleted
  AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
  AND p.paid_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
  AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', p.paid_at), ct.name
ORDER BY 1,"(%)" desc;

WITH invoice_payments AS (
    -- CTE para obter todas as faturas com informações de pagamento
    SELECT DISTINCT
        i.id,
        i.status,
        i.due_date,
        i.company_id,
        p.paid_at,
        p.id as payment_id,
        -- Classificação do pagamento baseada no MÊS de vencimento vs MÊS de pagamento
        CASE
            WHEN p.id IS NULL  THEN 'nunca_paga' -- Não existe registro de pagamento
            WHEN date_trunc('month', p.paid_at) <= date_trunc('month', i.due_date) THEN 'paga_em_dia' -- Paga no mês de vencimento ou antes
            WHEN date_trunc('month', p.paid_at) > date_trunc('month', i.due_date) AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date THEN 'paga_posteriormente' -- Paga após o mês de vencimento
            ELSE 'desconhecido'
        END as classificacao_pagamento
    FROM invoices i
    JOIN charges c ON i.id = c.invoice_id AND i.company_id = c.company_id
    LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
    WHERE i.company_id = '$company_id'
        and i.status <> 5 
        and c.status <> 5
        AND (i.is_negotiation IS FALSE OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
        -- Faturas que venciam no período especificado
        AND i.due_date::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
        AND i.due_date::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
),
invoice_summary AS (
    -- CTE para resumir por fatura (uma linha por fatura)
    SELECT DISTINCT
        i.id,
        i.due_date,
        i.company_id,
        -- Para faturas com múltiplos pagamentos, prioriza conforme hierarquia
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN i.classificacao_pagamento = 'paga_em_dia' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 'paga_em_dia'
            WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN i.classificacao_pagamento = 'paga_posteriormente' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 'paga_posteriormente'
            --WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN i.classificacao_pagamento = 'nunca_paga' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 'nunca_paga'
            ELSE 'nunca_paga'
        END as classificacao_final
    FROM invoice_payments i
    GROUP BY i.id, i.due_date, i.company_id
)
-- Query final com os resultados agrupados por mês de vencimento
SELECT
    -- Mês/Ano de vencimento (agrupamento por mês)
    TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', due_date), 'MM/YYYY') as "Mês de Vencimento",    
    -- Pagas no mês de vencimento
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN classificacao_final = 'paga_em_dia' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)
            ELSE 0
        END, 2
    ) as "% Pagas no Mês",    
    -- Pagas posteriormente (após o mês de vencimento, mas já pagas)
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN classificacao_final = 'paga_posteriormente' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)
            ELSE 0
        END, 2
    ) as "% Pagas Posteriormente",    
    -- Ainda em aberto (nunca pagas)
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN classificacao_final = 'nunca_paga' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)
            ELSE 0
        END, 2
    ) as "% Ainda em Aberto"        
FROM invoice_summary
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', due_date)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', due_date);

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) <= date_trunc('day', i.due_date) THEN 'Pago até o vencimento'
        WHEN date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) > date_trunc('day', i.due_date) THEN 'Pago após vencimento'
        ELSE 'Sem classificação'
    END AS "Ciclo de Pagamento",
    ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) * 100.0) / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) OVER (), 3) AS "%"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id AND c.company_id = i.company_id
WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
    AND NOT p.deleted
    AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
    AND p.paid_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
    AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY "Ciclo de Pagamento"
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
CASE
WHEN date(p.paid_at) < date(i.due_date) THEN 'Pago antes do vencimento'
WHEN date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) = date_trunc('day', i.due_date) THEN 'Pago no vencimento'
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '10 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 10 dias após'
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '10 days' AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '20 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 20 dias após'
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '20 days' AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 30 dias após'
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '30 days' AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '45 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 45 dias após'
--WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '45 days' and date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '60 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 60 dias após'
--WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '60 days' AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '75 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 75 dias após'
--WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '75 days' AND date(p.paid_at) <= date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'Pagos em até 90 dias após'
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) + INTERVAL '45 days' THEN 'Pgto após 45 dias depois do vencimento'
ELSE 'Sem classificação'
END AS "Ciclo de Pagamento",
COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS "Quantidade",
ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) * 100.0) / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) OVER (), 3) AS "%"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id AND c.company_id = i.company_id
WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
AND NOT p.deleted
AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
AND date_trunc('month', p.paid_at) = date_trunc('month', current_date - INTERVAL '${meses_retroativos}' month)
GROUP BY "Ciclo de Pagamento"
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Ciclo de Pagamento do Ultimo Mês

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', p.paid_at) AS "Período",
CASE
WHEN date(p.paid_at) < date(i.due_date) THEN 'Pago antes do ven.'
WHEN date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) = date_trunc('day', i.due_date) THEN 'Pago no ven.' 
WHEN date(p.paid_at) > date(i.due_date) THEN 'Pago após o ven.'
ELSE 'Sem classificação'
END AS "Ciclo de Pagamento",
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) * 100.0) / 
        SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('month', p.paid_at)), 
        2
    ) AS "(%)"
FROM payments p
INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id AND c.company_id = i.company_id
WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
AND NOT p.deleted
AND (NOT i.is_negotiation OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
  AND p.paid_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
  AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY "Período", "Ciclo de Pagamento"
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT 
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', i.created_at), 'MM/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  COUNT(*) AS "Quantidade"
FROM invoices AS i
JOIN charges as c on c.invoice_id = i.id and c.company_id = i.company_id
WHERE 
  i.company_id = '$company_id'
  AND i.deleted = false
  AND i.is_negotiation = true
  AND i.status = 3 and c.status = 3
	AND i.created_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
  AND i.created_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', i.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', i.created_at);

SELECT 
  TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', i.created_at), 'MM/YYYY') AS "Mês",
  --COUNT(*) AS "Quantidade",
  SUM(i.amount + i.fine_amount + i.interest_amount - i.discount) AS "Valor Final"
FROM invoices AS i
JOIN charges as c on c.invoice_id = i.id and c.company_id = i.company_id
WHERE 
  i.company_id = '$company_id'
  AND i.deleted = false
  AND i.is_negotiation = true
  AND i.status = 3 and c.status = 3
  and c.deleted = false
	AND i.created_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
  AND i.created_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', i.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', i.created_at);

WITH negociacoes_pagas AS (
  SELECT
    i.origin,
    CASE i.origin
      WHEN 1 THEN 'ERP'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Hotsite Pix'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Portal do Cliente'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Plataforma'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'API'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'PixGen'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Portal de Negociação'
      WHEN 8 THEN 'Portal Internet Pré-paga'
      WHEN 9 THEN 'Portal da inadimplência'
      WHEN 10 THEN 'Agente de Cobrança'
      WHEN 11 THEN 'Regra de Notificação'
      WHEN 12 THEN 'Omnichannel'
      WHEN 13 THEN 'Grace'
      WHEN 14 THEN 'Negociação do Operador'
      ELSE 'Origem Desconhecida'
    END AS origem_negociacao,
    COUNT(*) AS quantidade,
    SUM(i.amount) AS valor_base,
    SUM(i.fine_amount) AS multa,
    SUM(i.interest_amount) AS juros,
    SUM(i.discount) AS desconto,
    SUM(i.amount + i.fine_amount + i.interest_amount - i.discount) AS valor_final
  FROM invoices AS i
  WHERE
    i.company_id = '$company_id'
    AND i.deleted = false
    AND i.is_negotiation = true
    AND i.status = 3
    AND date_trunc('month', i.created_at) = date_trunc('month', current_date - INTERVAL '${meses_retroativos}' month)
  GROUP BY i.origin
),
total_geral AS (
  SELECT
    origin,
    COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM invoices
  WHERE
    company_id = '$company_id'
    AND deleted = false
    AND is_negotiation = true
    AND date_trunc('month', created_at) = date_trunc('month', current_date - INTERVAL '${meses_retroativos}' month)
  GROUP BY origin
)
SELECT
  np.origem_negociacao AS "Orig. Negociação",
  COALESCE(tg.total, 0) AS "Total Geradas",
    np.quantidade AS "Total Pagas",
  ROUND(
    CASE 
      WHEN COALESCE(tg.total, 0) > 0 
      THEN (np.quantidade::NUMERIC / tg.total::NUMERIC) * 100 
      ELSE 0 
    END, 
    2
  ) AS "% Pago",    
  np.multa AS "Multa",
  np.juros AS "Juros",
  np.desconto AS "Desconto",
  np.valor_final AS "Valor Final"
FROM negociacoes_pagas AS np
LEFT JOIN total_geral AS tg ON np.origin = tg.origin

SELECT
    CASE i.origin
        WHEN 1 THEN 'ERP'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Hotsite Pix'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Portal do Cliente'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Plataforma'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'API'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'PixGen'
        WHEN 7 THEN 'Portal de Negociação'
        WHEN 8 THEN 'Portal Internet Pré-paga'
        WHEN 9 THEN 'Portal da inadimplência'
        WHEN 10 THEN 'Agente de Cobrança'
        WHEN 11 THEN 'Regra de Notificação'
        WHEN 12 THEN 'Omnichannel'
        WHEN 13 THEN 'Grace'
        WHEN 14 THEN 'Negociação do Operador'
        ELSE 'Origem Desconhecida'
    END AS "Origem da Negociação",
    COUNT(p.id) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Boleto') AS "Qtd Boleto",
    SUM(p.amount) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Boleto') AS "Valor Boleto",
    COUNT(p.id) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Pix') AS "Qtd Pix",
    SUM(p.amount) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Pix') AS "Valor Pix",
    COUNT(p.id) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Cartão de Crédito') AS "Qtd Cartão",
    SUM(p.amount) FILTER (WHERE ct.name = 'Cartão de Crédito') AS "Valor Cartão"
--    COUNT(p.id) FILTER (WHERE ct.name NOT IN ('Boleto', 'Pix', 'Cartão de Crédito')) AS "Qtd Outros",
--    SUM(p.amount) FILTER (WHERE ct.name NOT IN ('Boleto', 'Pix', 'Cartão de Crédito')) AS "Valor Outros"   
FROM invoices AS i
JOIN charges AS c ON c.invoice_id = i.id AND c.company_id = i.company_id
JOIN payments AS p ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id AND ca.company_id = c.company_id
INNER JOIN collection_types ct ON ca.collection_type_id = ct.id
WHERE 
    i.company_id = '$company_id'
    AND i.deleted = false
    AND i.is_negotiation = true
    AND i.status = 3
    AND c.status = 3
    AND date_trunc('month', i.created_at) = date_trunc('month', current_date - INTERVAL '${meses_retroativos}' month)
GROUP BY i.origin

panels.title: Negociação - Agrupado por Forma de Pagamento

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('month', i.created_at) AS "Mês",
  CASE i.origin
    WHEN 1 THEN 'ERP'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Hotsite Pix'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Portal do Cliente'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Plataforma'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'API'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'PixGen'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Portal de Negociação'
    WHEN 8 THEN 'Portal Internet Pré-paga'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'Portal da inadimplência'
    WHEN 10 THEN 'Agente de Cobrança'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'Regra de Notificação'
    WHEN 12 THEN 'Omnichannel'
    WHEN 13 THEN 'Grace'
    WHEN 14 THEN 'Negociação do Operador'
    ELSE 'Origem Desconhecida'
  END AS "Origem da Negociação",
  COUNT(*) AS "Quantidade"
FROM invoices AS i
JOIN charges as c on c.invoice_id = i.id and c.company_id = i.company_id
    WHERE 
      i.company_id = '$company_id'
      AND i.deleted = false
      AND i.is_negotiation = true
      AND i.status = 3 and c.status = 3
      AND i.created_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
      AND i.created_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
GROUP BY i.origin,"Mês" 
ORDER BY i.origin,"Mês";

-- Análise de clientes que pagaram em atraso
-- e depois pagaram pontualmente por recorrência - CADA MÊS COMPARADO COM O ANTERIOR
WITH meses_periodo AS (
    -- Gera todos os meses do período informado
    SELECT generate_series(
        date_trunc('month', '${data_inicio}'::date),
        date_trunc('month', '${data_fim}'::date),
        interval '1 month'
    ) as mes_base
),
clientes_atrasados_por_mes AS (
    -- Para cada mês, busca clientes que pagaram em atraso no mês anterior
    SELECT 
        mp.mes_base,
        i.customer_id
    FROM meses_periodo mp
    CROSS JOIN payments p
    INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id 
        AND p.company_id = c.company_id
    INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id 
        AND c.company_id = i.company_id
    INNER JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id 
        AND ca.company_id = c.company_id
    INNER JOIN collection_types ct ON ca.collection_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
        AND p.deleted = FALSE
        AND (i.is_negotiation = FALSE OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
        AND ct.id = 3  -- Cartão de crédito
        -- Pagamentos em atraso do mês anterior ao mês base
        AND p.paid_at::date >= date_trunc('month', mp.mes_base - INTERVAL '1 month')::date
        AND p.paid_at::date <= (date_trunc('month', mp.mes_base - INTERVAL '1 month') + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::date
        AND date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) > date_trunc('day', i.due_date)  -- Pagamento após vencimento
),
clientes_pontuais_por_mes AS (
    -- Para cada mês, busca clientes que pagaram pontualmente por recorrência no mês base
    SELECT 
        mp.mes_base,
        i.customer_id
    FROM meses_periodo mp
    CROSS JOIN payments p
    INNER JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id 
        AND p.company_id = c.company_id
    INNER JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id 
        AND c.company_id = i.company_id
    INNER JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id 
        AND ca.company_id = c.company_id
    INNER JOIN collection_types ct ON ca.collection_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE p.company_id = '$company_id'
        AND p.deleted = FALSE
        AND (i.is_negotiation = FALSE OR i.negotiation_type = 2)
        AND ct.id = 3  -- Cartão de crédito
        -- Pagamentos pontuais do mês base
        AND p.paid_at::date >= date_trunc('month', mp.mes_base)::date
        AND p.paid_at::date <= (date_trunc('month', mp.mes_base) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::date
        AND date_trunc('day', p.paid_at) <= date_trunc('day', i.due_date) + INTERVAL '5' day -- Pagamento até vencimento, mais 5 dias
        AND p.origin = 2  -- Recorrência
),
dados_mensais AS (
    -- Agrupa os dados por mês
    SELECT 
        mp.mes_base,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cam.customer_id) as total_atrasados,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cpm.customer_id) as total_recuperados
    FROM meses_periodo mp
    LEFT JOIN clientes_atrasados_por_mes cam ON mp.mes_base = cam.mes_base
    LEFT JOIN clientes_pontuais_por_mes cpm ON mp.mes_base = cpm.mes_base 
        AND cam.customer_id = cpm.customer_id  -- Mesmo cliente que estava em atraso
    GROUP BY mp.mes_base
)
-- Resultado final: análise da recuperação por mês
SELECT 
    mes_base AS "Mês Base",
    CASE 
        WHEN total_atrasados > 0 THEN 
            ROUND((total_recuperados * 100.0) / total_atrasados, 2)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS "Taxa de Recuperação (%)"
FROM dados_mensais
ORDER BY mes_base;

WITH pagamentos_por_mes AS (
    -- Materializa os pagamentos por mês e customer uma única vez
    SELECT DISTINCT
        date_trunc('month', p.paid_at) AS mes,
        i.customer_id
    FROM payments p
    JOIN charges c ON p.charge_id = c.id AND p.company_id = c.company_id
    JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id
    JOIN invoices i ON c.invoice_id = i.id
    WHERE c.company_id = '${company_id}'
      AND p.company_id = '${company_id}'
      AND p.paid_at >= date_trunc('month', '${data_inicio}'::date)
      AND p.paid_at < date_trunc('month', '${data_fim}'::date) + INTERVAL '1 month'
      AND ca.collection_type_id = 3
      AND c.status = 3
      AND p.origin = 2
),
clientes_com_anterior AS (
    -- Usa self-join para encontrar clientes retidos em uma única passagem
    SELECT 
        atual.mes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT atual.customer_id) AS total_clientes,
        COUNT(DISTINCT anterior.customer_id) AS clientes_retidos
    FROM pagamentos_por_mes atual
    LEFT JOIN pagamentos_por_mes anterior 
        ON anterior.customer_id = atual.customer_id
        AND anterior.mes = atual.mes - INTERVAL '1 month'
    GROUP BY atual.mes
),
com_mes_anterior AS (
    -- Adiciona total de clientes do mês anterior
    SELECT 
        mes,
        total_clientes,
        clientes_retidos,
        LAG(total_clientes) OVER (ORDER BY mes) AS clientes_mes_anterior
    FROM clientes_com_anterior
)
SELECT 
    mes AS "Mês",
    ROUND(
        CASE 
            WHEN clientes_mes_anterior > 0 
            THEN (clientes_retidos * 100.0) / clientes_mes_anterior
            ELSE 0 
        END, 
        2
    ) AS "Taxa de Retenção (%)"
FROM com_mes_anterior
WHERE clientes_mes_anterior IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY mes;

SELECT
    --TO_CHAR(date_trunc('day', p.paid_at ), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Período",
    --COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS "Faturas",
    c.charge_attempt AS "n.º Tentativa",
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT c.id)) OVER (PARTITION BY TO_CHAR(date_trunc('day', p.paid_at), 'YYYY-MM')),
        2
    ) AS "Tentativas"
FROM payments p 
join charges c on p.charge_id = c.id and p.company_id = c.company_id
JOIN collection_agreements ca ON c.collection_agreement_id = ca.id and c.company_id = ca.company_id
WHERE c.company_id = '$company_id'
AND p.paid_at::date >= '${data_inicio}'::date
AND p.paid_at::date <= '${data_fim}'::date
AND ca.collection_type_id = 3
AND c.status = 3
and c.charge_attempt > 0
and p.deleted is false
and p.origin = 2
GROUP BY
    TO_CHAR(date_trunc('day', p.paid_at), 'YYYY-MM'),
    c.charge_attempt
ORDER BY-- "Período", 
"Tentativas"

panels.title: Recorrência -  Eficiência de Cobrança por Tentativa

list.definition:
SELECT name AS __text, id AS __value 
FROM companies
WHERE deleted is false 
AND disabled is false
ORDER by 1
